title: Phase 1: Equation to 2D Visualization
description: Build a system that takes mathematical equations and renders them as 2D graphs. This foundational phase focuses on parsing input equations, generating coordinate points, and rendering the visual output.

title: Phase 2: 3D Surface Generation
description: Extend the system to generate 3D surfaces from equations. This phase adds depth and complexity by introducing z-axis support and mesh generation.

title: Phase 3: Real-World Output
description: Convert 3D models into real-world output formats. This final phase enables exporting models for 3D printing and other physical applications.
